report.summary: Researched and built 2 new learn guides — Monad Blockchain Guide (parallel EVM L1, 10K TPS, $293M TVL) and Smart Wallets & Account Abstraction Guide (ERC-4337, EIP-7702, 200M+ smart accounts) — with full SEO optimization, structured data, and PUBLISH_QUEUE placement.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Monad: Launched mainnet Nov 24, 2025 with 10,000 TPS, 0.8s finality, $244M Paradigm/Coinbase funding. TVL at ~$293M (up 23%). MON token at $0.023. Aave v3 deploying mid-late March 2026. Major unlock March 24 (50%+ of 100B supply locked).

Smart Wallets & Account Abstraction: 200M+ smart accounts deployed. EIP-7702 activated with Pectra upgrade May 2025. 11K+ authorizations in first week. Coinbase Smart Wallet and Safe leading adoption. Security concern: 65-70% of early EIP-7702 delegations linked to phishing.

Topic selection rationale: Both topics had zero existing coverage on degen0x despite being top-trending narratives for 2026. Monad fills the high-performance L1 gap (parallel EVM not yet covered as standalone guide). Smart wallets covers the mainstream crypto onboarding narrative.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Monad Blockchain Guide (~2,800 words): 9 sections covering parallel execution architecture, MON tokenomics/unlock risk, DeFi ecosystem (Uniswap, Aave, Chainlink), competitive comparison table (vs Solana, MegaETH, Ethereum, Base, Sui), risks with severity badges, and getting-started walkthrough. 6 FAQ entries.

Smart Wallets & Account Abstraction Guide (~3,000 words): 9 sections covering EOA vs smart wallet distinction, ERC-4337 architecture (UserOps, Bundlers, EntryPoint, Paymasters), EIP-7702 Pectra upgrade, feature grid (gas sponsorship, batching, social recovery, passkeys), provider comparison table (Coinbase, Safe, Biconomy, ZeroDev), adoption stats, phishing security risks, and setup walkthrough. 6 FAQ entries.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Monad: Title 'Monad Blockchain Guide: 10,000 TPS EVM L1 Explained 2026 | degen0x' (62 chars). Keywords: monad blockchain, parallel execution, mon token, monad vs solana. Article + FAQ structured data. OG/Twitter cards configured.

Smart Wallets: Title 'Smart Wallets & Account Abstraction Guide | degen0x Learn'. Keywords: smart wallets, account abstraction, ERC-4337, EIP-7702, Pectra upgrade. Article + FAQ structured data. Fixed schema params (datePublished/dateModified, author, wordCount) and added OG publishedTime/authors.
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts. Internal links to chain comparison tool, DeFi yields tool, gas tracker, wallet guides, and related learn articles.

next_actions: Promote both slugs from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES in next publish cycle
Consider adding Monad to ecosystem directory (src/app/ecosystem/monad/)
Potential follow-up tools: Monad ecosystem tracker, smart wallet gas savings calculator
